# Acme Typography System

Consistent typography creates a professional and readable interface.

## Font Families

### Primary: Inter
Used for all UI elements and body text.
- Weights: 400 (Regular), 500 (Medium), 600 (Semibold), 700 (Bold)
- Available on Google Fonts

### Monospace: JetBrains Mono
Used for code blocks and technical content.
- Weights: 400, 500
- Available on Google Fonts

## Type Scale

| Name | Size | Line Height | Usage |
|------|------|-------------|-------|
| Display | 48px | 1.1 | Hero headlines |
| H1 | 32px | 1.2 | Page titles |
| H2 | 24px | 1.3 | Section headers |
| H3 | 20px | 1.4 | Subsection headers |
| Body | 16px | 1.5 | Paragraphs, UI text |
| Small | 14px | 1.5 | Captions, metadata |
| Tiny | 12px | 1.4 | Labels, badges |

## Usage Guidelines
- Use sentence case for headings
- Maximum line length: 65-75 characters
- Paragraph spacing: 1em (16px)
- Use Medium (500) weight for emphasis, Bold (700) for strong emphasis
